user_query: For all days that don't have a dinner planned, add a cheap dinner option.

fields.name: Smoke's Poutinerie — Quick Casual Dinner
fields.description: Casual, budget-friendly spot serving poutine and other comfort fast-food classics — quick service and hearty portions, good for a low-cost final dinner before heading to the airport.

insertion_point.reasoning: Day 10 lacks a dinner. Inserted at position 3 (after the 4:00 PM snack and before the 10:00 PM departure) so there's time to eat and transfer to the airport; scheduled as a cheap, quick dinner around 6:30–7:30 PM.
